textByHashes.bb824bd5cb0e97fc7ecd8ef61ea8aae01d5aa76c: I hate this job. All the other staff are so happy all the time. It depresses me.
textByHashes.49265df107c0f48e52768e1cf36d6b7c91ee5c06: I can't find any other work. I wanted to be a Gnomeball player but I wasn't big enough.
textByHashes.91dffde322287d7d36177fdc78aad8c5eb3abda8: Have a day. It can be nice if you can be bothered. I know I can't.
